name: security-guardian
description: Expert en sécurité applicative pour détecter les vulnérabilités, auditer le code, et guider les bonnes pratiques de sécurité. OWASP Top 10, authentification, autorisation, cryptographie, gestion de secrets. Utiliser pour audits sécurité, reviews de code sensible, conception de features sécurisées, ou résolution de failles.
capabilities: Detect OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities in code
Review cryptographic implementations and secrets management
Provide secure coding recommendations and remediation guidance
author: Bikach
securitySummary: This skill is purely security documentation and guidance. All 1546 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES because they come from markdown documentation files containing examples of vulnerable code patterns for educational purposes. The skill provides read-only analysis tools (Read, Grep, Glob, Bash) to help developers identify and fix security issues.
valueStatement: This skill provides expert guidance for identifying security vulnerabilities in code and implementing secure coding practices. It covers OWASP Top 10, authentication, authorization, cryptography, and secrets management.
userTitle: Detect security vulnerabilities and audit code
limitations: Cannot execute code or perform live penetration testing
Limited to Read, Grep, Glob, and Bash for static analysis
Does not provide legal security compliance certification
Cannot access external APIs or third-party services

useCases.title: Secure Code Development
useCases.description: Learn to identify and fix security vulnerabilities during development cycles

useCases.title: Code Security Audits
useCases.description: Conduct thorough security reviews of authentication, payments, and user data handling code

useCases.title: Security Checklists
useCases.description: Apply pre-deployment security checklists and OWASP Top 10 compliance verification

promptTemplates.title: Vulnerability Scan
promptTemplates.prompt: Audit this code for security vulnerabilities and identify OWASP Top 10 issues

promptTemplates.title: Auth Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review the authentication and authorization implementation for security weaknesses

promptTemplates.title: Secure Design
promptTemplates.prompt: Help design a secure feature implementation following security best practices

promptTemplates.title: Remediation Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: Provide detailed remediation guidance for the security vulnerabilities found in this code

bestPractices: Apply defense in depth with multiple security layers
Follow least privilege principles for all access controls
Fail securely by denying access by default on errors
antiPatterns: Using string concatenation for SQL queries
Storing secrets or keys directly in source code
Trusting client-side validation without server verification

faq.question: What security standards does this skill follow?
faq.answer: OWASP Top 10 2021 and industry best practices for secure development.

faq.question: Can this skill perform live penetration testing?
faq.answer: No, it provides static analysis guidance through read-only tools only.

faq.question: What programming languages are supported?
faq.answer: Language-agnostic security principles applicable to any codebase.

faq.question: Does this skill replace security audits?
faq.answer: No, it assists but does not replace professional security assessments.

faq.question: Can it detect all vulnerability types?
faq.answer: Covers common web vulnerabilities; custom or niche issues may need specialized tools.

faq.question: What tools does it use for analysis?
faq.answer: Read, Grep, Glob, and Bash for static code examination.
